properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Bless the Lord, Oh my soul Oh my soul, worship his holy name Sing like never before, Oh my soul I'll worship your holy name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The sun comes up, it's a new day dawning It's time to sing your song again Whatever may pass and whatever lies before me Let me be singing when the evening comes

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You're rich in love and you're slow to anger Your name is great and your heart is kind For all your goodness, I will keep on singing Ten thousand reasons for my heart to find

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And on that day when my strength is failing The end draws near and my time has come Still my soul will sing your praise unending Ten thousand years and then forevermore
